name: Nerdamer
when_to_use: 需要可复算的代数化简、展开、因式分解、符号微积分或方程求解时用它而非手写,因为原生 AI 心算在长表达式的符号等价性和一致性上会失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认会间歇性漏项、错符号且无法保证两次推导一致；Nerdamer 提供可执行的符号结果,让化简、微积分和解方程逐项可验。

data_in.note: 输入钉死为 Nerdamer 表达式字符串与可选变量替换表；符号运算通过返回的 Symbol API 或 all.min 暴露的原生函数执行。

schema.expression: string —— Nerdamer 语法表达式或等式
schema.variables?: Record<string, string | number> —— 变量替换,默认 {}
schema.variable?: string —— 微积分或单变量求解的变量名,默认 'x'

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵；all.min 入口包含 Algebra/Calculus/Solve/Extra 模块。
provides.outputs: 规范化符号字符串、展开/因式分解结果、导数/不定积分表达式或方程解数组；可回显,也可采样后喂给函数图。

api_surface.evaluate: nerdamer(expression, variables).text() → 规范化字符串
api_surface.differentiate: nerdamer.diff(expression, variable).text() → 导数(diff 是静态函数,非 Expression 方法)
api_surface.integrate: nerdamer.integrate(expression, variable).text() → 不定积分(integrate 是静态函数,非 Expression 方法)

peer.note: 本条只算不渲；典型链是 Nerdamer 得到/验证表达式,再把表达式字符串交给 function-plot。

boot.note: 必须导入 all.min.js/+esm；包根 +esm 只有 core,不保证 Algebra/Calculus/Solve 完整可用。

isolation.evidence: all.min.js/+esm scan: 0 `document.head`, 0 `document.body`, 0 createElement('style'), 0 createElement('canvas'), 0 document/window addEventListener. Fully headless pure-JS symbolic math with no DOM interaction at all — trivially shadow-safe (it renders nothing; consumer handles any display).

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need reproducible algebraic simplification, expansion, factorization, symbolic calculus, or equation solving, instead of doing it by hand, because native AI calculation fails at symbolic equivalence and consistency for long expressions.
en.why_valuable: AI intermittently drops terms, changes signs, and cannot guarantee identical results across derivations. Nerdamer provides executable symbolic results so simplification, calculus, and equation solving can be verified item by item.

data_in.note: Input is fixed to a Nerdamer expression string and an optional variable-substitution map. Symbolic operations use the returned Symbol API or native functions exposed by all.min.

schema.variables?: Record<string, string | number> -- Variable substitutions; default {}
schema.variable?: string -- Variable name for calculus or single-variable solving; default 'x'
